title: 10 best herbal teas for gum pain
description: Camellia sinensis, also known as tea, teas helps with gum pain because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The catechins present in Camellia sinensis teas have been shown to reduce swelling and alleviate pain in the gums. The antioxidants in tea also help to combat free radicals that can cause inflammation and irritation in the gums.
